verses.text: When friends urge David to flee like a bird to the mountains, he answers, 'In the LORD put I my trust.' Though the very foundations seem destroyed, he will not run in fear. Faith does not flee at every threat but rests in the God who cannot be shaken.

When friends urge David to flee like a bird to the mountains, he answers, 'In the LORD put I my trust.' Though the very foundations seem destroyed, he will not run in fear. Faith does not flee at every threat but rests in the God who cannot be shaken.

When friends urge David to flee like a bird to the mountains, he answers, 'In the LORD put I my trust.' Though the very foundations seem destroyed, he will not run in fear. Faith does not flee at every threat but rests in the God who cannot be shaken.

The LORD is in His holy temple, His throne in heaven; His eyes test the children of men, and the upright shall behold His face. God reigns above the turmoil. He sees and tries all hearts, and the righteous will at last look on Him with joy.
